title: S.Chand Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: S.Chand Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at S.Chand Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About S.Chand Group:
S.Chand Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group!
